data.name: ZVtok — AI TikTok studio
data.description: TikTok content engine (Claude Code tips carousels + real bug-fix documentary videos) that sells ZVlabs digital products — Claude Code packs and workflow tooling — on Gumroad. First milestone: 10–20 organic sales.
data.nextStep: Session 1: Neil records the screen while Claude works the iOS PWA dock-bug fix arc (material in ~/Claude/dock-issue) — first documentary video + session notes. In parallel Claude drafts the first 6 tips carousels. Full plan in ~/Claude/zvtok/CLAUDE.md.
data.lastDid: Went from strategy brief to a committed plan: viability assessed with market research (viable, but generic prompt packs are commoditized — our moat is video proof of real work; first product rescoped from a single dock-bug fix to a full iOS PWA polish kit). Project folder created at ~/Claude/zvtok with a complete CLAUDE.md handoff.
data.notes:
• Single account (existing ZVlabs TikTok), personal not business (keeps trending sounds; bio link unlocks at ~1,000 followers)
• Track A: tips carousels 2–3×/week (growth) · Track B: documentary bug-fix videos, irregular (conversion)
• Products: one-time Gumroad files ~$5–$15; first product = iOS PWA polish kit built on ~/Claude/dock-issue
• Inbound only — no ads, no cold outreach; cross-post videos to YouTube Shorts as a free hedge
• Claude leads writing/engineering/slides/analytics; Neil records, voices, posts (~2–4 hrs/wk)
• Realistic expectations: 10–20 sales in ~2–3 months is the win condition, not big income

log.text: Founded the venture. Reviewed the ZVlabs TikTok+Gumroad strategy brief, verified the market on Gumroad (competitor Claude Code packs exist; outcomes sell, collections don't), delivered the viability verdict (viable as low-risk build, not near-term income), and made two calls: keep the dock-bug as the first documentary video but sell the whole iOS PWA polish kit as the product, and cross-post videos to YouTube Shorts. Set up ~/Claude/zvtok (CLAUDE.md handoff + original brief + Claude Code launcher) and this hub entry.
